content:
FINAL OWNER CONTROL RECOVERY — EAS, SIGNING, OWNER SESSION, AND RELEASE

This is the next mandatory production task.

Rork dependency removal is complete at the code/runtime level, but owner control
is not complete because:

- EAS is not initialized under the IVX owner account
- Android signing is not owner-controlled
- signed APK/AAB do not exist
- Google Play is not configured
- Apple/iOS is not configured
- owner session control must be verified across every protected module

Complete owner control end-to-end now.

==================================================
1. OWNER EAS AUTHORIZATION
==================================================

Use only the IVX owner Expo/EAS account.

Required workflow:

1. Open Expo/EAS login.
2. Owner authenticates directly.
3. Run:
   cd expo
   bun x eas login
   bun x eas init
4. Create or link the EAS project under the owner account.
5. Preserve:
   - Android package name
   - iOS bundle identifier
   - app name
   - version
6. Save the generated EAS project ID in app.json/app.config.
7. Commit the configuration to the owner GitHub repository.
8. Confirm no Rork account, project ID, plugin, or credential is used.

Return:

EAS_OWNER=
EAS_PROJECT_ID=
ANDROID_PACKAGE=
IOS_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER=
CONFIG_COMMIT_SHA=
RORK_ACCESS=false

If interactive owner approval is required, stop only at the login/approval
screen and return the exact owner action required.

==================================================
2. OWNER ANDROID SIGNING
==================================================

Create or import owner-controlled Android signing credentials.

Requirements:

- signing key controlled by IVX owner
- Rork has no access
- private keystore never exposed in chat
- preserve package name
- preserve versionCode sequence
- preserve versionName
- record SHA-1 and SHA-256 fingerprints
- store credentials only in owner-controlled EAS/secure storage

Return:

SIGNING_OWNER=
KEYSTORE_CONFIGURED=true/false
CERTIFICATE_SHA1=
CERTIFICATE_SHA256=
RORK_SIGNING_ACCESS=false

==================================================
3. BUILD OWNER-CONTROLLED APK AND AAB
==================================================

Run:

bun x eas build --profile preview --platform android
bun x eas build --profile production --platform android

Required output:

- preview APK
- production signed AAB
- build IDs
- artifact links
- SHA-256 checksums
- build commit SHA

Do not use Expo Go.
Do not use Metro.
Do not use Rork build infrastructure.

==================================================
4. OWNER SESSION CONTROL
==================================================

Verify one authoritative Supabase owner session across:

- Profile
- Owner Login
- Admin Panel
- Admin HQ
- Owner Console
- Access Control
- Variables
- Security Box
- Developer Workspace
- IVX Owner AI
- Deploy Approval
- GitHub Control
- Render Control
- Members
- Investors
- CRM
- Revenue
- Transactions

Fix all inconsistent states such as:

- ownerSessionPresent=false
- tokenPresent=false
- ownerEmailAllowlisted=false
- readyToRun=false
- profile appears signed in but admin modules are blocked

Requirements:

1. One session store.
2. One access-token source.
3. One refresh-token source.
4. One owner allowlist.
5. Server-side JWT validation.
6. Session restoration after app restart.
7. Session restoration after device reboot.
8. Immediate revocation after owner logout.
9. No Expo owner-proof gate.
10. No duplicate owner login.
11. No local-only owner identity.

==================================================
5. OWNER ACCESS CONTROL DASHBOARD
==================================================

Complete Admin HQ → Access Control.

The owner must be able to select a user and control:

- role
- screens
- actions
- data scope
- start date
- expiration date
- active/suspended status
- force logout
- require MFA
- direct allow
- direct deny
- access templates
- access groups

Supported roles:

- owner
- IVX staff
- admin
- member
- investor
- buyer
- JV partner
- influencer
- realtor
- broker
- agent
- tokenized investor
- lender
- auditor

Required owner flow:

Admin HQ
→ Access Control
→ Select User
→ Select Role
→ Select Screens
→ Select Actions
→ Select Data Scope
→ Preview
→ Publish
→ Immediate Enforcement

Permissions must apply to:

- Android navigation
- web navigation
- deep links
- backend APIs
- database RLS

==================================================
6. CLEAN DEVICE OWNER TEST
==================================================

Install the signed APK on a clean Android device.

Test:

1. Launch from Android launcher.
2. Confirm Expo Go is not used.
3. Sign in as owner.
4. Restart app.
5. Confirm session persists.
6. Open Admin HQ.
7. Open Access Control.
8. Select one test user.
9. Grant one screen.
10. Confirm the screen appears.
11. Remove the screen.
12. Confirm it disappears.
13. Direct API request returns 403 after removal.
14. Force logout the test user.
15. Confirm session revocation.
16. Open Variables.
17. Open Developer Workspace.
18. Send IVX AI message.
19. Receive real response.
20. Restart app and confirm persistence.

Provide screen recording and sanitized logs.

==================================================
7. GOOGLE PLAY OWNER CONTROL
==================================================

Use only the owner Google Play Console account.

Required:

- owner creates/verifies Play Console app
- owner-controlled service account
- minimum required permissions
- service-account JSON stored securely
- never paste JSON into chat
- upload signed AAB to Internal Testing
- verify package name
- verify versionCode
- verify signing certificate
- verify owner account

Return:

PLAY_CONSOLE_OWNER=
APP_ID=
SERVICE_ACCOUNT_VALIDATED=
INTERNAL_TEST_RELEASE=
RELEASE_STATUS=

==================================================
8. IOS OWNER CONTROL
==================================================

Use only owner Apple Developer/App Store Connect accounts.

Required:

- Apple Team
- App Store Connect app
- owner-controlled certificate
- provisioning profile
- App Store Connect API key
- TestFlight build

Never expose .p8 contents.
Never commit Apple credentials.

Return:

APPLE_TEAM=
IOS_BUNDLE_IDENTIFIER=
IOS_BUILD_ID=
TESTFLIGHT_STATUS=
RORK_APPLE_ACCESS=false

==================================================
9. FINAL OWNER CONTROL EVIDENCE
==================================================

Return:

GITHUB_OWNER=
RENDER_OWNER=
SUPABASE_OWNER=
EAS_OWNER=
ANDROID_SIGNING_OWNER=
GOOGLE_PLAY_OWNER=
APPLE_OWNER=
AI_PROVIDER_OWNER=
DNS_OWNER=

RORK_ACCESS_PRESENT=true/false for each system.

Required equality:

GITHUB_HEAD_SHA
=
RENDER_DEPLOYED_SHA
=
BACKEND_COMMIT_MARKER
=
ANDROID_BUILD_SHA
=
WEB_BUILD_SHA

==================================================
FINAL VERDICT
==================================================

Return exactly one:

IVX OWNER CONTROL VERIFIED

or

IVX OWNER CONTROL INCOMPLETE

Do not return VERIFIED unless:

- EAS is owner-controlled
- Android signing is owner-controlled
- signed APK exists
- signed AAB exists
- clean-device owner login works
- owner session persists
- Admin HQ recognizes owner
- Access Control works
- role/screen permissions apply immediately
- backend returns 403 for revoked access
- RLS enforces access
- Google Play is owner-controlled
- Apple ownership is configured or clearly listed as the only remaining owner action
- no Rork access remains
- all source/build SHAs match
